name: happiffie-vendor-matching-engine
description: Happiffie AI Vendor Matching Engine Demo

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
